01001.name: Roland Banks
01001.text:
[reaction] After you defeat an enemy: Discover 1 clue at your location. (Limit once per round.)
[elder_sign] effect: +1 for each clue on your location.

01006.name: Roland's .38 Special
01006.text: Roland Banks deck only. Uses (4 ammo). [action] Spend 1 ammo: Fight. You get +1 [combat] for this attack (if there are 1 or more clues on your location, you get +3 [combat], instead). This attack deals +1 damage.

01021.name: Guard Dog
01021.text: [reaction] When an enemy attack deals damage to Guard Dog: Deal 1 damage to the attacking enemy.

01022.name: Evidence!
01022.text:
Fast. Play after you defeat an enemy.
Discover 1 clue at your location.

01039.name: Deduction
01039.text: If this skill test is successful while investigating a location, discover 1 additional clue at that location.

01090.name: Perception
01090.text:
Max 1 committed per skill test.
If this test is successful, draw 1 card.

01144.name: The Ritual Begins
01144.text: Each enemy gets +1 fight and +1 evade.

01149.name: Main Path
01149.text: The Main Path is connected to each other [[Woods]] location. [action]: Resign. "There's nothing we can do to stop them!" You flee from the woods, leaving Arkham to its grisly fate.

01150.name: Arkham Woods
01150.text: Forced - After you enter this location: Test [willpower] (4). If you fail, take 1 horror and 1 damage.

01152.name: Arkham Woods
01152.text: This location is investigated using [willpower] instead of the skill indicated by the investigation attempt.

01154.name: Arkham Woods
01154.text: This location is investigated using [combat] instead of the skill indicated by the investigation attempt.

50034.name: Arkham Woods
50034.text: Forced - After you reveal a chaos token from the chaos bag while investigating this location: Reveal and resolve an additional chaos token. (Limit once per test.)

decision.prompt: Opening hand: Guard Dog, Perception, Roland's .38 Special, Evidence!, Deduction. Set aside any number of cards, then draw replacements together.
